title: Calvin's From The Fog
description:
Minecraft too peaceful...Try this and regret trying it :)

(Calvin's From The Fog Series Modpack)
body:
This modpack adds many scary mods like "From The Fog" and "The End of Herobrine" To make minecraft more scary and makes you constantly on your toes. Many different dwellers are also in this modpack like "The Man From The Fog" and the "Cave Dweller" If you like horror games and like minecraft, this modpack is a great balance between vanilla and modded horror. This modpack was inspired by Calvins "From The Fog" series on youtube. This modpack isn't 100% accurate as I don't have access to his mod folder, but just based on what I can see, but these are most of the mods. I will update this pack when new mods are shown in the episodes.

(fyi if your installing the newer versions i labeled the versions based off season and episode)
